assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends upgrading L4 pool first (Phase 2) followed by A100 pool (Phase 3) with separate timing and configurations

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green upgrade for L4 pool, not surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed section on GPU driver compatibility verification with staging testing and mentions CUDA version changes and inference framework compatibility

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states to wait for fine-tuning jobs to complete and includes commands to verify no active fine-tuning jobs before A100 upgrade

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GPU VMs don't support live migration → every pod restart causes inference latency spikes' in the strategy rationale

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs) at all

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: While response mentions autoscaling throughout, it does not specifically address the issue of new nodes created by auto-scaler being at old version during upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed staging testing section with commands to create staging node pool and test inference workloads for driver/CUDA compatibility
